title: Meta Ads Algorithm
subtitle: How Meta's ad auction and ML targeting actually work — and how to operate them without burning budget
description: A practical course on how Meta's advertising system works for engineers, marketers, and founders running paid acquisition. Covers the auction mechanics, ad delivery ML, targeting and audiences (Advantage+, custom, lookalike), creative as the new targeting, measurement and attribution after iOS 14.5, optimization patterns, and the recurring mistakes that waste budget. Not pro-Meta or anti-Meta; just how the system works in 2026 and how to operate it.
audience: Marketers, growth engineers, and founders running paid acquisition on Meta. Some ads experience helps; not required.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with online advertising concepts
Some Meta Ads Manager exposure helps but not required
outcomes: Explain how Meta's ad auction picks winners (bid + estimated action rates + quality)
Use the ML delivery system rather than fighting it
Build targeting strategies that respect modern signal loss
Treat creative as the dominant lever in 2026
Measure attribution honestly after iOS 14.5 and Consent Mode
Optimize budget, structure, and learning phase deliberately
Avoid the mistakes that waste budget
